title: IssuedCertificateTermandConditionTypeValues
description:
Rules defining how long the certificate remains usable.

Comment:
Valid for 90 days from issuance date.
Expires on a fixed calendar date.
Automatically marked Expired after deadline.
Cannot be reinstated once expired.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Eligibility Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Who can use or redeem the certificate.

Comment:
Only the participant to whom the certificate was issued; must have an active account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Redemption Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions governing how and when the certificate can be redeemed.

Comment::
Redeemable only via mobile app.
Minimum purchase of $100 required.
One-time use only.
Cannot be combined with other offers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Usage Restriction Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Constraints limiting where or how the certificate may be applied.

Comment::
Valid only at partner merchants.
Not valid for cash withdrawal.
Non-transferable.
Not applicable to fee payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Settlement Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules governing how the reward value is applied financially
.
Comment:
Applied as statement credit.
Deducted at checkout.
Partial redemption not allowed.
No cash equivalent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Adjustment Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Circumstances under which the bank may modify or revoke the certificate.

Comment:
Revoked if qualifying transaction is reversed.
Adjusted if reward miscalculated.
Cancelled upon account closure.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Authentication Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for validating the certificate.

Comment: 
Must provide the authentication code; one-time use only.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued Certificate Expiration Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Validity period and conditions for expiry.

Comment:
Expires 12 months from issue date; expired certificates cannot be redeemed.
